title: Create: Finanzamt
body:
Yes, you heard right...

CREATE: FINANZAMT!

A New Mod adding Euros to the Game
Originally thought as a meme, it got made for economy.
It adds multiple Euro's (5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200)
and some funny jokes in german
Because, yk Finanzamt and stuff

anyways, have fun playing with the mod :)
